entries.text: Saint Ancus Justinian was only defeated in battle once.
St. Justinian mainly uses a Scythe, a very unconventional weapon.
St. Justinian is the Father of Pyromancy.
It is believed that St. Justinian was cursed upon his death, and his husk roams the depths.
Remos is the God of Light. His dormant soul gives light to the land.
Ermira is the Goddess of Nature. Her soul orbits the broken moon of Oohr.
Oohr is the God of the Waters. His fractured soul gives light to the night.
Firlia committed the first sin.
Undeath is a divine sin in the lands.
The Sun is the sigil of House Guillaume of Solaria
The Lion is the sigil of House Hastings of the Aenglik
The Dragon is the sigil of House Bergström of Wintergard
The Horse is the sigil of House Çelik of Zahir
The White Cross is the sigil of House Gerhardt of Albreich
The Bear is the sigil of House Lazarev of Norovynd
Becoming a revenant erases you from everyone's memories.
The Solaria-Lionheart Wars lasted 9 years.
Dragons were thought to be extinct for 970 years.
There is an alliance between the Aenglik Kingdoms, Solaria, & Wintergard, commonly known as the "Three Crowns."
"Crows" are rangers from the north.
There is a colossal tree in the lands of Ettria known as "Eyrrneth."
It is said that sap from the colossal tree "Eyrrneth" has great healing properties.
The Covenant of Light is the first religion of the lands.
It has been 1,146 years since the Empire of Fantasia was established.
There were many Imperial Guardians during the height of the Empire. Many remain today.
The Solitarius is an ancient self-regenerating gemstone that is used to teleport into a pocket dimension.
